steps.title: Translate each given statement into an equation
steps.content:
(1) Height is 61 inches: Since $y$ is height, we have $y = 61$.
(2) Length is 3 times height: Since $x$ is length, we have $x = 3y$.

The system is: $x = 3y$ and $y = 61$

steps.title: Identify the matching answer choice
steps.content:
Checking each choice:
  • A: $y = 3x$ and $x = 61$ — backwards relationship and wrong constant
  • B: $y = 3x$ and $y = 61$ — backwards relationship
  • C: $x = 3y$ and $x = 61$ — correct relationship but assigns 61 to the wrong variable
  • D: $x = 3y$ and $y = 61$ — matches our system exactly
That matches choice D — D is correct.
